terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.clause1: By using the Tower Tactic Game website (including applications and social media pages), you accept these terms and conditions, Privacy Policy (referred to in this agreement as "we" or "our"). We may change these terms and conditions at any time, and such changes will be posted on the website. By continuing to use the website, you agree to be bound by those changes.
terms.clause2: Access to this website and its content (for the purpose of this agreement relating to the software and programming used in the operation of this website, and all text, photographs, images, illustrations, graphics, sound recordings, videos, and audio-video clips, and other items contained in this website, hereinafter collectively referred to as "Content" or "Components") is subject to all computer program laws and this agreement. By accessing, browsing information, and purchasing products on this website, you accept this agreement without limitation or condition. If you disagree, please stop using this website. This agreement may be modified by us from time to time without direct notification to you. The latest agreement will be posted on the website, and you should always check the latest agreement before using the website to ensure that you have a current understanding of the latest agreement under which you are permitted to use this website.
terms.clause3: Access to this website (or parts of this website) and the use of information, content, products, or services provided through this website (or parts of this website) is not intended and prohibited to access or use in a manner that violates laws or computer program regulations.
